stemHtml: An aircraft is flying from Bratislava, Slovakia to Hamburg, Germany and there is a polar front lying across the route. Where around the front is freezing rain most likely to be encountered?

options.a: Below the front, in the cold sector, below the 0°C isotherm.
options.b: Below the front, in the cold sector, above the 0°C isotherm.
options.c: Above the front, in the warm sector, above the 0°C isotherm.
options.d: Above the front, in the cold sector, below the 0°C isotherm.
